title: AGY-101: Secure Agentic Development: Installation & Setup
author: tridorian Labs & Google Cloud
description: Welcome to the foundational course for Google Antigravity. This L100 module covers the secure installation, setup, and initialization of the Antigravity developer platform. Learners will understand installation surface tiers (Tiers 1, 2, and 3), navigate the initial launch configuration (setup flows, editor profiles), master execution policies (terminal execution, review, and JavaScript policies), select appropriate agent autonomy modes (secure mode vs review-driven development), and verify their environment through workspace testing.

features.title: Multi-Tier Installation
features.description: Select between Native Installer (Tier 1), Standalone Tarball (Tier 2), or Containerized OCI Sandbox (Tier 3) based on corporate IT security constraints.

features.title: Autonomy & Safety Policies
features.description: Establish workspace security boundaries using terminal execution, artifact review, and JavaScript run policies.

features.title: Workspace Verification
features.description: Validate the active toolchain and run permissions tests with an autonomous agent verifying environment read, write, and execution capabilities.
